titleStmt.title: SII 30.88: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 88. (A.R. No. 165 of 1915.) Kīḻputtūr, Wandiwash Taluk, North Arcot District Svayambhunāthasvami temple-on the south wall of the same maṇḍapa Kulōttuṅga-Chōḻa II: year 7: 1140 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription registers the sale of a land as dēvādāna for providing sacred cloths (tiruppaḍimāṟṟu) to the temple of Tirukkumarīsvaramuḍaiya Mahādēva at Irukkalāmputtūr in Poṉnūr-nāḍu, a subdivision of Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍa sōḻa-maṇḍalam by certain individuals of Irukkalāmputtūr village by name Ilāḍai Kumaraṉ Murugaṉ alias Muruga Vēlāṉ, Pūttuṟai Sāttaṉ Sūriyaṉ, and Paiyabhūthi Kāmaṉ Sēri.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmevu vaḷara tiruppoṉmārvu puṇara nāmevu kalai
makaḷ nalam peritu ciṟappa vijayaṉ makaḷ velpuyattiruppa Icai
yiṉ celvi Eṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar vantiṟaiñca niṇila maṭantaiyai
t tirumaṇam puṇarntu cirvaḷar tirumaṇi muṭikavittena maṇimuṭicūṭi mallaiñāla
ttup palluyirkkellā mellaiyiliṉpamiyalpiṉṉeytac cempoṉ virasimhāsa
nattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya korāja kesarivarmmarāṉa tibhuvanaccakra
vattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa devarkku yāṇṭu 7 Ēḻāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu
veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattup poṉnūr nāṭṭu Irukkalāmputtūr Ilāṭaikumaraṉ murukanāṉa
murukaveḷāṉum pūttuṟai cāttaṉ cūriyanum paiya pūtikāmaṉ ceriyum Ivvanaivom
Ivvūrt tirukkumāriśvaramuṭaiya mahādevarkkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟukku devadānamāka vi
ṟṟuk kuṭutta bhūmiyāvatu Ivvūrt ten kaḻaniyil koṅkental vaṭapāṟkellai
ka ceṟuvukkut tenvarampukkut tenmelaic ciṟṟavaraṅ kuṇṭiṉ teṉvarampukku
tteṉmelai veppaṅkaḻuvaṟ teṉvarampukkut teṉmelai neṭṭaracukkut teṉ
melaik kallālkku meṟkun teṟkum melpāṟkellai ceṅkālukku k
kuk koṅkental melkaṭaiyil muṭṭak kiḻakkum teṉpāṟ kellaiyil ven
talu mental nirkoppakappaṭavuṅ kiḻpāṟkellai yivventaṟ kiḻkkaṭaik kallum pā
ṟaikku meṟkum vaṭakkuk kuṇantāṅkik kiṇaṟṟukku melai maricukku meṟkkum Iṉnāṟpā
lellai naṭuvupaṭṭa viḷainilanuṅ kollai nilanu menokkiya maramuṅ kiṇokkiya kiṇaṟu
Uṭumpoṭi yāmai naṭan=ta nilan=tiruppaṭimāṟṟukkuṭalāka śrī paṇṭāratte poruḷaṟak ko
ṇṭu bhūmi vilaiyaṟa viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Ivvūrilāṭai kumaraṉ murukanāna muru
ka veḷāṉum pūttuṟai cāttaṉ cūriyaṉum paiyapūti kāmaṉ ceriyum Ivvūr
kkuc camaintu Emmilicainta vilaip poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭuttom
Ivvaṉaivom Itu paṉmāheśvara rakṣai . Itil viḷakkuppaṭṭi puṉṉaic ceṟuvum kuṭiompiyum
Ivvūr koṇṭu viṭṭen piṭāraṉ pācamaṟuttāneṉ ..
Digital edition of SII 30.88 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
